revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[Asukayama Park]] * [[Oji Shrine]] * [[Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude> [[Category:Kita, Tokyo|µ]] [[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[Asukayama Park]] * [[Oji Shrine]] * [[Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude> [[Category:Kita, Tokyo|µ]] [[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: fix redirect [[Oji Shrine]] → [[Ōji Shrine]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[:en:Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[:en:City of Kita Board of Education|City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[:en:Asukayama Park|Asukayama Park]] * [[Ōji Shrine|Oji Shrine]] * [[:en:Kyu-Furukawa Gardens|Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[:en:Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[:en:Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[:en:Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[:en:Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[:en:City of Kita Board of Education|City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[:en:Lycée Français International de Tokyo|Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[:en:Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School|Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School|Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[:en:Tokyo Seitoku University|Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[:en:Tokyo University of Social Welfare|Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[:en:Asukayama Park|Asukayama Park]] * [[Ōji Shrine|Oji Shrine]] * [[:en:Kyu-Furukawa Gardens|Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[:en:Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[:en:Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[:en:Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[:en:Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[:en:City of Kita Board of Education|City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[:en:Lycée Français International de Tokyo|Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[:en:Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School|Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School|Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[:en:Tokyo Seitoku University|Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[:en:Tokyo University of Social Welfare|Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[:en:Asukayama Park|Asukayama Park]] * [[Ōji Shrine|Oji Shrine]] * [[:en:Kyu-Furukawa Gardens|Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[:en:Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[:en:Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[:en:Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[:en:Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[:en:City of Kita Board of Education|City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[:en:Lycée Français International de Tokyo|Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[:en:Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School|Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School|Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[:en:Tokyo Seitoku University|Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[:en:Tokyo University of Social Welfare|Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[:en:Asukayama Park|Asukayama Park]] * [[Ōji Shrine|Oji Shrine]] * [[:en:Kyu-Furukawa Gardens|Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[:en:Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[:en:Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[:en:Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Kita, Tokyo |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Kita, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita, Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Kita-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Kita in Tokyo]] |below = This list is incomplete. |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Akabane-Iwabuchi Area |list1 = * [[:en:Akabane, Tokyo|Akabane]] * Akabanedai * Akabanekita * Akabaneminami * Akabanenishi * Iwabuchichō * Kamiya * Kirigaoka * Nishigaoka * Shimo * Ukima |group2 = Ōji Area |list2 = * Higashijūjō * Horifune * Jūjōdai * Jūjōnakahara * Kamijūjō * Kishichō * Nakajūjō * Ōji * Ōjihonmachi * Toshima |group3 = Takinogawa Area |list3 = * Higashitabata * Kaminakazato * Nakazato * Nishigahara * Sakaemachi * Shōwachō * Tabata * Tabatashin-chō * Takinogawa }} |group2 = Schools |list2 = * [[:en:City of Kita Board of Education|City of Kita Board of Education]] * [[:en:Lycée Français International de Tokyo|Lycée Français International de Tokyo]] * [[:en:Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School|Tokyo Korean Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School|Seigakuin Junior & Senior High School]] |group3 = Colleges and universities |list3 = * [[:en:Tokyo Seitoku University|Tokyo Seitoku University]] * [[:en:Tokyo University of Social Welfare|Tokyo University of Social Welfare]] <nowiki>Oji Campus</nowiki> |group4 = Landmarks |list4 = * [[:en:Asukayama Park|Asukayama Park]] * [[Ōji Shrine|Oji Shrine]] * [[:en:Kyu-Furukawa Gardens|Kyu-Furukawa Gardens]] |group5 = Major stations |list5 = * [[:en:Akabane Station|Akabane]] (JR) * [[:en:Akabane-iwabuchi Station|Akabane-iwabuchi]] (Metro, Saitama Rapid) * [[:en:Kumanomae Station| Kumanomae]] (Nippori-Toneri, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Ōji Station (Tokyo)|Ōji]] (JR, Metro, Sakura Tram) * [[:en:Tabata Station (Tokyo)|Tabata]] (JR) }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
